inline_comments.message:
These jobs will not pick the subproject. 
Do you need the subproject version of these jobs rather than these ones?

Unfortunately I have no idea what some of these lines mean. I have no idea what the subproject section does. What is drv-vnfm-root. For example does dev mean anything or just a string.
What I need is a build that runs in the svnfm folder, is only triggered by the change in the pom.xml within that folder. If uses the onlyRoot profile during mvn executions. Very sorry, but have not idea if the subproject is required or not.
Maybe the subproject means that that this is located within VFC?

Don't worry.. I am here to help.. 

So, looking at your repo "vfc/nfvo/driver/vnfm/svnfm" it seems that the subproject section you will not need it at all since this is just for specific subfolders in svnfm. Since we need this to be triggered by the files in the root on svnfm, then these jobs should do it. 

Go ahead and remove the subproject section. Everything else looks good.
